notes: Dinner menu captured in full including appetizers, soups/salads, mains, sides, add-ons, simply prepared proteins, and chilled seafood. Multiple other menus (Lounge, Brunch, Desserts, Happy Hour, In-Room Dining) referenced on site but not included in raw text. No beverage/wine list present in this extract.
